data.description: You become invisible until the spell ends. While invisible, you can't cast spells, and you leave behind your gear, which remains where you left it.
You can leap up to a number of feet equal to 3 + your Strength modifier. You can jump up to twice your Strength modifier on a successful DC 10 Strength check.

an that can within The object can be a door, a box, a chest, a of set manacles, padlock, another that a object contains mundane ar magical that access. means prevents Atarget is shut mundane ar that held bya is or becomes
This rule indicates the effect or source is derived from the target of a spell, ability, or action.
An instantaneous spell comes and goes upon the casting of the spell. The effects, however, are usually long-lasting.
A brief summary of the lore that comes to mind about a named thing.
This spell creates a portable extradimensional space that functions as a chest.
A spell that deals damage or has an immediate effect lasts only long enough to deliver its burst, line, or target. Then it is gone.
